About

Customer Experience
& Technology

Founded in 2021 under the mission to bring world-class customer experience practices to Mongolia, REBERU helps businesses of all sizes understand their customers and build lasting loyalty through data-driven CX strategies tailored to each organization's context.

We work as embedded partners — designing research programs, facilitating capability workshops, and deploying technology that drives measurable change. 85% of our clients return for repeat engagements, a testament to the long-term partnerships we build.

In 2025, we established Reberu Lab — our dedicated technology company — to develop and deploy a proprietary Voice of Customer (VOC) management platform. Reberu Lab delivers real-time insights, automated action loops, and a unified dashboard that transforms how organizations listen and respond to their customers.

85% of our clients return for repeat engagements, and our work has delivered an average 19% increase in satisfaction scores, 65% reduction in complaints, and 48% revenue growth across our portfolio.

Core Services

CX Solutions

We offer a complete suite of measurement, capability development, and management consulting services — grounded in international frameworks and tailored to each organization's context.

01 / 03
CX Research & Measurement
Systematic measurement and analysis of customer experience across every touchpoint.
  • CX Quality Research (NPS / CSAT)
  • Customer Journey Mapping (CJM)
  • Mystery Shopping & Service Audit
  • Detailed reports & recommendations
02 / 03
CX Workshop Programs
Practical training programs that build CX capability at every organizational level.
  • Customer-centric service (6 hours)
  • Customer Journey Mapping (2 days)
  • Service standard development (8 hours)
  • CX manager certification (2 months)
03 / 03
CX Management Consulting
Strategic consulting to embed a unified service standard and create brand differentiation.
  • Service standard development & rollout
  • CX strategy & operational planning
  • Culture transformation & behavioral change
  • AI Agent Workshop
Technology — Reberu Lab

VOC Management Ecosystem

Our proprietary platform unifies feedback, research, and complaint management into one real-time intelligence system — giving your organization the power to act on customer voice continuously.

PLATFORM / 01
Research & Dashboard Platform
Survey templates, real-time data collection, branch scoring, and unified analytics reporting in one place.
ResearchDashboardReal-time
APPLICATION / 02
Feedback & Review App
Collect NPS/CSAT via QR code or link. Monitor public and private feedback across all channels continuously.
QR / LinkNPS/CSATMulti-channel
SYSTEM / 03
Complaint Management System
Ticket logging, assignment, categorization, SLA tracking, and full API integration for seamless workflows.
TicketsSLAAPI
Unified Superplatform
One platform. Every voice.
Dashboard, feedback app, and complaint system — unified in real time.
